name: Henan Shijia Photons Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Shijia Photons Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of PLC photonic chips and optoelectronic devices. It offers PLC splitters, arrayed waveguide grating products, active products, optical fiber cables, and OEM platforms. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
